title: Epistle configuration
description: Configuration for the Epistle codebase-to-LLM-context CLI (epistle.config.json). Every field is optional; CLI flags always win over config values.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete and validation.

include.description: Glob patterns to force-include after ignore/exclude filtering.

exclude.description: Additional glob patterns to exclude from scanning.

maxFileSizeKB.description: Skip files larger than this many kilobytes (default: 100).

lite.description: Lite mode: auto-prune heavy assets and data files.

task.description: Task or instructions appended to the context.

removeEmptyLines.description: Remove blank lines from file contents.

compress.description: Signature-only compression: keep imports and declarations, elide bodies.

maxTokens.description: Drop the largest files until output fits within this token budget.

includeDiffs.description: Append working-tree and staged git diffs to the output.

includeLogs.description: Append recent commit history: true for 20 commits, or a positive commit count.

encoding.description: Tokenizer encoding for token counts (default: o200k_base).

profiles.description: Named presets selected with --profile. Profile values override base config.

lineNumbers.description: Prefix file contents with line numbers.

copy.description: Copy the generated context to the clipboard.

sort.description: File order: path (default), churn (most-edited last), or size (largest last).

profile.description: A named preset: any base config field except profiles.
